title: thelypteris turrialbae
intro: Thelypteris turrialbae is a species of fern native to Costa Rica, classified under the family Thelypteridaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. Its health benefits include the potential treatment of various ailments, such as arthritis and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Thelypteris turrialbae can be prepared as a tea or infusion for medicinal use, or as a supplement in capsule or powder form.
